scope: Phase 3 UMI - analysis assumptions for Lanota

notes.combo_definition: circular-lane judged hit objects (time-based with angular position)

tips.rationale: Lanota charts are geometry-native with a stable circular lane and explicit angular timing, enabling precise, deterministic movement and rhythm tips once mapped to element taxonomy.

table.name: adapter-validator canonical kinds alignment
table.expected: All emitted note kinds must be within schema.canonical_kinds

table.name: geometry-native scope enforcement
table.expected: No gameplay difficulty inference; geometry/timing only

table.name: tips enablement gate
table.expected: Tips generation must respect Phase 4 gating

consistency_checks.notes: Lanota consistency checks follow the Bandori anchor: enforce scope, geometry-first semantics, and Phase 4 gating rather than raw-type or DB parity.
